title: Raw subprocess without command gateway
description: Direct subprocess.run() or subprocess.Popen() calls bypass command gateway, losing audit trail and validation
symptoms: No receipt generated for command execution
root_cause: Developer used subprocess directly instead of command_gateway.execute_command()

fix.description: Replace raw subprocess with command gateway
steps: Import command_gateway: from ORGANS.MECHANICUS.SCRIPTS.command_gateway import execute_command
Handle result dict instead of CompletedProcess

occurrences.context: Sanctum uses raw subprocess for git commands
